# Captains Fish and Chicken
> Fresh Fried Fish & Chicken in Cedar Rapids

## NAP
- Name: Captains Fish and Chicken
- Address: 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402
- Phone: (319) 221-1040
- Email: info@captainsfishandchicken.com

## Hours
Mon–Thu 11am–10pm · Fri–Sat 11am–11pm · Sun 11am–8pm

## Domain
https://captainsfishandchicken.com

## Description
Walk into Captains Fish and Chicken on 1st Ave NE and you smell it immediately — that unmistakable aroma of hand-breaded catfish sizzling in the fryer. We don't do frozen fillets. We don't do shortcuts. Every piece of fish, every chicken wing, every hush puppy gets fried to order. Hot. Crispy. Done right.

We're a family-owned spot in Cedar Rapids, IA, serving portions big enough to satisfy a lumberjack and prices gentle enough for a lunch break. Most combos run $10–$15 with fries and bread included. Our regulars? They come back for the crunch. That golden crust that crackles when you bite into it. The juicy meat inside. The seasoning that hits every taste bud.

Whether you're dining in at our clean, welcoming spot on 1st Ave or ordering through UberEats and DoorDash for delivery, you get the same quality — fried fresh, never sitting under a heat lamp. That's the Captain's way.

## Owner
Captains Fish and Chicken Inc

## Payment Accepted
Cash, Visa, Mastercard, Apple Pay

## Year Established
2024
